mapper.insert:
insert into sub_agent_relation(id, main_agent_id, sub_agent_id, create_time, update_time, status, reserver, remark) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.mainAgentId}, #{entity.subAgentId}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.reserver}, #{entity.remark})
mapper.select:
select count(1) from sub_agent_relation sar inner join agent_definition main_ad on main_ad.id = sar.main_agent_id inner join agent_definition sub_ad on sub_ad.id = sar.sub_agent_id
and (main_ad.name like concat('%', #{pageRequest.keyword}, '%') or sub_ad.name like concat('%', #{pageRequest.keyword}, '%') or sar.remark like concat('%', #{pageRequest.keyword}, '%'))
and main_ad.name like concat('%', #{pageRequest.mainAgentName}, '%')
and sub_ad.name like concat('%', #{pageRequest.subAgentName}, '%')
and sar.status = #{pageRequest.status}
